value.found_quote: Selecting a subagent from the panel opens a full-screen detail view. This view shows the entirety of the subagent’s conversation, including its steps, thoughts, and tool execution logs.
value.rationale: The page describes a full-screen Subagent Detail View showing the subagent's entire conversation including steps, thoughts, and tool execution logs, matching the claim. It is presented as a current feature of the Antigravity CLI.
